message.content:
# WordPress Admin Panel: Hero Section Editor Analysis

## Overview
This appears to be a WordPress admin panel for editing a Hero section, likely using a custom theme or plugin (Vulture Core v3.0.1) with a specialized interface for page building.

## Visible Fields and Controls

### Main Section Header
- **Title**: "Section Hero" with a "SLIDER" tag
- **Description**: "Carrousel plein écran avec texte, CTA et blocs latéraux optionnels" (Full-screen carousel with text, CTA and optional side blocks)

### Pre-built Templates Section
- **Title**: "MODELES PRECONSTRUIS" (Pre-built templates)
- Three template options:
  1. **Luxe Minimaliste** (Popular tag)
     - Description: "Hero plein écran, texte centre, overlay sombre"
  2. **Boutique Moderne** 
     - Description: "Hero standard avec blocs latéraux produits"
  3. **Editorial Bold** (New tag)
     - Description: "Grand hero avec typographie impactante"

### Slider Parameters Section
- Collapsible section titled "Paramètres du Slider" (Slider parameters)
- Currently collapsed (indicated by downward arrow)

## Left Sidebar Navigation
- **Vulture Accueil** (selected)
  - Page d'accueil (Homepage)
  - Sections
    - Hero (selected)
    - Confiance
    - Categories
    - Produits
  - Contenu (Content)
    - Bannière
    - Marquee
    - Témoignages
    - Blog
    - Instagram
    - Global

## What the User Can Currently Edit
1. **Hero section type**: Can select between different pre-built templates
2. **Slider parameters**: Can access slider settings (though currently collapsed)
3. **Section configuration**: Can navigate between different sections of the homepage

## Missing Compared to Full WYSIWYG Editor (like Elementor)
1. **Live preview**: No visual representation of the actual hero section being edited
2. **Direct content editing**: Cannot edit text, images, or CTA buttons directly
3. **Advanced styling options**: No controls for colors, fonts, spacing, or responsive settings
4. **Media management**: Cannot upload or select images for the hero section
5. **Animation settings**: No controls for slide transitions or effects
6. **Layout customization**: Cannot modify the structure or arrangement of elements
7. **Real-time editing**: Changes aren't visible until saved and viewed on the frontend
8. **Drag-and-drop functionality**: No ability to rearrange elements visually
9. **Advanced typography controls**: Limited text formatting options
10. **Responsiveness preview**: Cannot see how the section will look on different devices

This interface appears to be more of a template selector and basic configuration panel rather than a full-featured visual editor, focusing on choosing predefined layouts rather than customizing content directly.
